title: Mezoneuron benguetense
taxonomy: Mezoneuron benguetense is a species of flowering plant in the family Caesalpiniaceae. It belongs to the genus Mezoneuron, which is a group of flowering plants. The species is native to the Philippines and is classified as an evergreen tree. Mezoneuron benguetense is a part of the subfamily Caesalpinioideae, which includes various species of flowering plants. The plant's classification is also supported by its unique characteristics and growth patterns.
